$comment: Feeds considered for the registry but excluded. Verifiability rule (RFP): a feed must be inspectable first-hand; an unverifiable source is excluded and labeled as such, never silently displayed. Every exclusion is a labeled, reversible datum — re-included if a live, inspectable product appears. Ids here must NOT also appear in feeds.json.

excluded.name: RiskLayer
excluded.reason: Unverifiable — risklayer.xyz does not resolve and the @risk_layer X account does not exist (verified 2026-06-21). No live, inspectable product to transcribe.

excluded.name: DeFi Sphere
excluded.reason: Unverifiable — no live product found; previously mis-attributed as a Block Analitica product, which it is not (verified 2026-06-17).

excluded.name: DeFi Saver
excluded.reason: Not a risk feed — DeFi Saver is a position-management dapp. Its public 'Explore' dashboards (Aave/Maker/Liquity) render protocol market data (TVL, supply/borrow caps, APY), liquidation telemetry (positions liquidated, seized collateral, repaid debt), and per-wallet position tooling. None of it is an attributable risk assessment OF a protocol, so it fails the charter's 'what a feed says about a protocol' test. Market data is already sourced from DefiLlama. Re-include only if DeFi Saver publishes a protocol-level rating product. (verified live 2026-06-22; API also 401-gated.)

excluded.name: Pharos
excluded.reason: No public-facing dashboard or risk methodology — alert product with no confirmed public event feed. Re-included if a live, inspectable feed appears (SAT-308).
